name: Lair of Darkness
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－シャドウ・ディストピア－
desc: All face-up monsters on the field become DARK. Once per turn, if you would Tribute a monster you control to activate a card effect, you can Tribute 1 DARK monster your opponent controls, even though you do not control it. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Special Summon as many "Torment Tokens" (Fiend/DARK/Level 3/ATK 1000/DEF 1000) as possible to the turn player's field in Defense Position, up to the number of monsters Tributed this turn while this card was face-up.
eff: All face-up monsters on the field become DARK. sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Slifer the Sky Dragon
